burial.place: Swain Farm, Royal Oak, Talbot County, MD

sources.note: Swain Farm, Royal Oak, Talbot County MD

notes: Born in Alexandria, VA. Son of John Henry Gemeny (1791-1850, aka John Gemeny II) and Matilda 'Milly' Figg (1796-1876). Siblings: Richard Henry Gemeny (1825-1873), Mary Elizabeth Gemeny (1832-1891), Benjamin Gemeny (1835-1895), Edgar John Gemeny (1839-1924), Amelia Gemeny (1841-1843). Civil War soldier from Virginia. Lived in Kinsale (near Pleasant View) through the 1860s, then moved to Baltimore (1865) and Royal Oak, Talbot County, MD. Father died Feb 8, 1850 in Alexandria. Mother Matilda died May 6, 1876 in Kinsale. Married Margaret Elnora 'Nora' Denny. Five children: Stephen Denny Gemeny (1859-1935), Edgar Dean Gemeny (1863-1939), Lillie May (1866-1867), Wilbur Fisk (1869-1870, both born and died in Royal Oak), Maria Elnora (1875-). Brother Richard Henry died 1873. Died April 13, 1882 at age 53 in Royal Oak, MD. Buried at Swain Farm, Royal Oak.
